messages.content: Write a function to compare only the keys between two nested objects. If keys exist in both objects, skip. if the key is not in the first object but is in the second - return the key object - the value of the missing value keys in the first object.
Everything is fine about code above, but you need to modify like to save the nesting structure in the returned object
Thank you! I'm glad I could help. If you have any more questions, feel free to ask!
